title: MikasRevs Phone
description: A Minecraft smartphone mod with multiplayer messages, social apps, GPS features, and Voice Call/Video Call (With Simple Voice Chat)
body:
![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa95c0b55118b85335f86dd6ebead6b22fba9685.png)![Item Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9ca786cbfea7ded2b8d721525afe268020dc457.png)

MikasRevs Phone is a Minecraft smartphone mod that adds a custom phone system with useful and fun in-game apps.

This mod is designed to make Minecraft feel more modern and city-life focused, especially for roleplay, survival servers, and multiplayer worlds.

You can change the phone language anytime from the in-game phone settings.

 

Optional:
- Simple Voice Chat (For Video/Voice Calls Feature)

-Kuro's Economy (For Bank App)

Note:
Simple Voice Chat is optional. The mod can run without it, but voice/call-related features may require Simple Voice Chat to work properly.

Video call is on beta.

Support Development

If you enjoy the project and want to support future updates:

❤️ Patreon: patreon.com/MikasRev

Your support helps improve the mod, fix bugs, and develop new ideas for future releases.
